recommendations.title: The Captain
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a pilot who had to ensure the safety of 128 passengers and crew members on the plane when its windshield became damaged mid-flight. The incident is regarded as one of the miracles in aviation history.

recommendations.title: Daisy
recommendations.overview: A painter in Amsterdam receives flowers from a mysterious admirer, while a hitman and cop find themselves in conflict.

recommendations.title: The Storm Riders
recommendations.overview: Heeding a prophecy, a warlord trains two orphans after killing their parents. But the skills he teaches could lead to his downfall.

recommendations.title: Legend of the Fist: The Return of Chen Zhen
recommendations.overview: The Japanese forces occupy Shanghai and slowly start spreading terror in the city. Chen Zhen, who was presumed dead, returns to fight against the Japanese and put an end to their tyrannical rule.

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs III
recommendations.overview: Triad gangster turned corrupt cop Lau Kin-ming goes to dangerous lengths to avoid detection.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs
recommendations.overview: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force. Years later, their older counterparts, Chen Wing Yan and Inspector Lau Kin Ming, respectiv
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: Initial D
recommendations.overview: After winning his first competition, Takumi focuses his attention on drift racing, a sport he has unknowingly perfected while delivering tofu in his father's Toyota AE86.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: The Flock
recommendations.overview: Erroll Babbage has spent his career tracking sex offenders and his unorthodox methods are nearly as brutal as the criminals he monitors. When he links one of his deranged parolees to the disappearance of a local girl, he and his new partner must scou

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs II
recommendations.overview: In this prequel to the original, a bloody power struggle among the Triads coincides with the 1997 handover of Hong Kong, setting up the events of the first film.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.
